feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: Pints And Ponytails
entry.summary:
Author: ad_lunam

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,100Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: It’s definitely Christopher’s fault—his long hair, to be exact—that Eddie ends up at this ridiculous “Pints and Ponytails” event. Unfortunately, there’s also a very hot guy there. And Eddie panics. A lot.

entry.title: Kisses on repeat
entry.summary:
Author: Ariiiflowers (Peaceandflowers)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,401Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 76

Summary: "Eddie knows something is going on. He can feel it—there’s something different in the air, Buck is acting a little strange, and every time he walks into a conversation at the station, everyone goes quiet. But he decides to ignore it; maybe he’s overthinking a bit and it’s all in his head.Until little things start happening between Buck and him that make him think maybe he isn’t completely wrong." Or “five times Buck accidentally kissed Eddie… and one time Eddie kissed him back.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Buck's Journey Into the Wild
entry.summary:
Author: MonicaGrace

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,998Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 13

Summary: Bobby just died. Buck is exhausted. All he has the energy for is falling asleep on his couch in Eddie's house. Next thing he knows... he's a cat in a forest? And everyone he knows is also a cat? AKA I'm forever trapped in the Warrior Cats Building and after Lab Rats came out I needed whimsy, and I figured a Warrior Cats AU would be really funny. Be the change you want to see in the world, right?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 139,892Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 89

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: grilled cheese
entry.summary:
Author: Diazstrdst (Aphrosephone118)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,446Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: "There's a sudden clatter next to them. All heads snap over to find Buck had dropped his spatula, leaving his hand trembling. He was also now breathing so heavily they could hear rattling in his chest. "Buck?"" OR An innocent comment from Harry about lunch sends Buck into a flashback of his time with Bonnie.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 178,016Chapters: 53/60Kudos: 902

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: leaping hurdles
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,562Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 79

Summary: She jerks back, ankle knocking against the corner of a barstool, causing her to wince. Buck blinks, thrown, his hand dropping from her chin. “Hey—what? Did I—” Shaking her head, she smiles. “No, just—later. I’m— Buck, I’m covered in someone else’s blood. Feels like a bad call for a first kiss.” Buck stares at her blankly for a beat. Then, softly, he says, “Eddie.” Her nose scrunches. “I know. It’s— second kiss. Technically. But—” “Eddie,” he cuts in, “I brought up marriage five minutes into this date. I asked if you thought Bobby would officiate. I live in your house. I’m in your will, and have been for— half a decade.”or: Buck and Eddie’s first date has gone a little sideways, but is far from ruined.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: After The Storm
entry.summary:
Author: milowren

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,235Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 88

Summary: “I’m sorry, I don’t know how,” Bonnie says, clicking the safety off and raising the gun.Buck closes his eyes, his heart pounding desperately in his chest, one hot tear rolling down his cheek. At least I’ll get to see Bobby again. He tries to focus on that instead of how he won’t ever see Maddie, Chim, his niece and nephew, Christopher, Ed—The door bursts back open. “Hey! Someone’s comin’!” Earl says, pulling it shut behind him.***Buck POV of the rescue scene in Mother's Boy, plus the aftermath.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Other Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,223Chapters: 23/30Kudos: 180

Summary: When the Buckleys decide their daughter belongs in an institution, Evan Buckley makes a choice. He chooses his sister. Andrea Buckley has cerebral palsy. She uses a wheelchair, sometimes a walker. She laughs loud, talks fast, and refuses to be reduced to a diagnosis. She is Evan’s whole heart. The night their parents try to send her away, Evan packs her bags, takes the keys, and drives toward Los Angeles with no plan and no backup. He becomes her brother, her guardian, her steady ground. Years later at the 118, his instincts with adaptive care and kids finally make sense to everyone else. Slow burn. Found family. And maybe something more with Eddie Diaz.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I hope you're with someone who isn't scared to ask
entry.summary:
Author: thegreaterdivide

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,591Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 28

Summary: He glanced, and he saw Buck. But he didn’t hear anything. His body reacted before his mind could; he grunted at the pain that shot up his arm, into his shoulder, but he kept reaching. Reaching until his fingers found Buck's neck, until the steady thump of his heart registered. Eddie puffed out a breath, his own heart hammering in his chest. He was fine. Buck didn’t stir at Eddie’s touch; in fact, he started snoring, his breath evening out. Eddie isn’t sure how long he kept his fingers on Buck's pulse after that, but he knows it was long enough that the thumping of Buck's heart calmed his own. Until he knew, even without checking, that their hearts beat in rhythm. That Buck was alive, and he was alive, and they were both beaten and bruised and probably more fucked up than Eddie cared to admit at the moment, but they were going home, together. Buck’s pulse kept beating under his touch. Alive, alive, alive.   Or, Eddie crashes out over not knowing how to help Buck and goes to Maddie, who clocks him :)

entry.title: 3 + 1 - Stimming
entry.summary:
Author: freddyfakeman

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 801Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Everyone knows that Buck is unable to sit still for longer that 5 seconds, everyone but BuckThe first time anyone one from the 118 is victim of Buck’s stims is when Eddie and Buck are baking, well Buck is teaching Eddie how to bake. It’s going well, some how. But slow, it’s going so slow because every two seconds but has to do happy circles in place with no warning. Meaning Eddie have to be hyper aware when he’s got the glass bowl because he WILL knock it over and loss their hours worth of work.   or..3 times Buck stims and everyone but him notices and one time he notices (/gets told but shh and enjoy my masterpiece)

entry.title: The Buck Effect
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,512Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 6

Summary: Science has said that one singular event can ultimately result in later much larger consequences. Eddie Diaz discovers the truth of this when he meets Evan (Buck) Buckley, and the trajectory of his life changes forever. It’s 1920 and the Great War has ended. Eddie Diaz, with his son Christopher, make the decision to move from Texas to the growing metropolis of Los Angeles. Former Army medic Eddie has a new job, a new career and, he hopes, a new direction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: In case I'm Asleep, Don't Pull the Plug
entry.summary:
Author: bottleofseltzer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,994Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 187

Summary: “Hey, you’re finally awake.” An unfamiliar voice says, breaking him out of his thoughts. Buck’s eyes follow the voice and land on a tall, tan, muscular man.   Maybe I did die. This man is too beautiful for Earth.   OR A year in the life in fourteen thousand eight hundred and twenty six words.

entry.title: The long way home
entry.summary:
Author: M00NR1NG

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,905Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 97

Summary: After the Firefighter Games in Nashville, a canceled flight leaves Evan Buckley and Eddie Diaz with only one option if they want to make it back to Los Angeles in time for Henrietta Wilson’s birthday: a cross-country road trip. But somewhere along the empty highways between Tennessee and California, another driver begins following them. What starts as a simple drive home ends in a crash on a lonely road—and when Eddie wakes up in the hospital, Buck is gone. Taken by a man who believes he’s on a mission from God.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Carry The Weight In Quiet
entry.summary:
Author: ashkey_unscriptedlive

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,823Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: Eddie hasn't told anyone about this road block in his head. A few years ago his best friend suffered cardiac arrest in a lighting storm. Eddie blames himself for not being able to pull Buck's weight up the rope. Evan "Buck" Buckley was dead for 3 minutes and 17 seconds and it haunts Eddie even after Buck survived. What happens when in Nashville during the firefighter games. Eddie Diaz is faced with an event where he has to pull the equivalent of Buck's weight up a tower free handed.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

Author: Qza29o

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,483Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 256
